properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Son of God, everlasting One, You have poured your grace on me, Love falls down, filling up my life And my heart sings out Your praise.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the seas resound, let the oceans roar With a song of glory for You Lord, Let it fill the sky, saturate my life With a song of glory for You Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Mercy sings, flowing through my soul And Your deep calls to my deep, oh Lord, Endless light, of a thousand dreams You have come and rescued me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let the sound of Your strong melody Break the chains as it rises in me As the heavens sing loud in the chorus of love I will lift up my voice and cry out From my soul I will send up a shout, Let the words of my life be the song You hear.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: With a song of glory for You, Lord, With a song of glory for You, Lord.
